online_shop.label: Online Shop / E-Commerce
online_shop.description: Sells goods or services primarily through the internet or social media

obligations.title: Business Name Registration
obligations.description: Register your business name with the Business Registration Service (BRS) via eCitizen.
obligations.action: Visit ecitizen.go.ke and register under 'Business Registration'
obligations.penalty: Operating an unregistered business is an offence under the Business Registration Service Act.

obligations.title: PIN Registration with KRA
obligations.description: Obtain a Personal Identification Number (PIN) from Kenya Revenue Authority.
obligations.action: Register at itax.kra.go.ke for a KRA PIN
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 10,000 for failure to register.

obligations.title: VAT Registration
obligations.description: Register for Value Added Tax (VAT) if your annual taxable turnover exceeds KES 5 million.
obligations.action: Register for VAT on iTax. File VAT returns monthly.
obligations.penalty: Penalty of 5% of tax due plus interest at 1% per month.

obligations.title: Data Protection Compliance
obligations.description: If you collect customer personal data (names, emails, phone numbers, payment info), you must comply with the Data Protection Act 2019.
obligations.authority: Office of the Data Protection Commissioner (ODPC)
obligations.action: Register as a Data Controller at odpc.go.ke. Create a privacy policy.
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 3 million or 1% of annual gross revenue.

obligations.title: Single Business Permit
obligations.description: Obtain a Single Business Permit (SBP) from your county government if operating from a physical premises.
obligations.action: Apply at your county government offices or eCitizen portal. Renew annually.
obligations.penalty: Closure of business and fines vary by county.

freelancer.label: Freelancer / Self-Employed
freelancer.description: Individual providing services independently (e.g., designer, developer, consultant, writer)

obligations.title: PIN Registration with KRA
obligations.description: All individuals earning income in Kenya must have a KRA PIN.
obligations.action: Register at itax.kra.go.ke
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 10,000.

obligations.title: Annual Income Tax Return
obligations.description: File an annual income tax return by 30th June each year, even if you had no income.
obligations.action: File on iTax under 'Returns > Income Tax - Resident Individual'
obligations.penalty: Late filing penalty of KES 2,000 per month or 5% of tax due.

obligations.title: Withholding Tax Awareness
obligations.description: Clients may deduct withholding tax (5%) on payments to you. Claim these credits when filing your return.
obligations.action: Request withholding tax certificates from clients. Track on iTax.
obligations.penalty: Missed credits result in overpayment of tax.

obligations.title: Data Protection Compliance
obligations.description: If you handle client personal data, comply with the Data Protection Act 2019.
obligations.authority: Office of the Data Protection Commissioner
obligations.action: Register as a Data Controller at odpc.go.ke if processing personal data regularly.
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 3 million.

obligations.title: VAT Registration
obligations.description: Register for VAT if annual turnover from services exceeds KES 5 million.
obligations.action: Register for VAT on iTax.
obligations.penalty: 5% penalty on tax due plus interest.

retail_store.label: Retail Store / Shop
retail_store.description: Physical shop selling goods to customers (e.g., grocery, clothes, hardware, electronics)

obligations.title: Business Name Registration
obligations.description: Register your business name with BRS before operating.
obligations.action: Register at ecitizen.go.ke under Business Registration.
obligations.penalty: Criminal offence under the Business Registration Service Act.

obligations.title: Single Business Permit
obligations.description: All physical businesses must obtain an annual Single Business Permit from the county.
obligations.action: Apply at your county offices. Renew every January.
obligations.penalty: Business closure and fines.

obligations.title: PIN Registration with KRA
obligations.description: Register for a KRA PIN to file taxes and conduct business.
obligations.action: Register at itax.kra.go.ke
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 10,000.

obligations.title: VAT Registration
obligations.description: Register for VAT if annual sales exceed KES 5 million.
obligations.action: Register on iTax. Issue ETR receipts. File VAT returns monthly.
obligations.penalty: 5% penalty plus 1% monthly interest. ETR non-compliance: KES 200,000 or 3 years imprisonment.

obligations.title: Employee Registration (NSSF & NHIF)
obligations.description: If you have employees, register them with NSSF (social security) and NHIF (health insurance) and remit contributions monthly.
obligations.action: Register employees at nssf.or.ke and nhif.or.ke. Remit by 9th of each month.
obligations.penalty: Fines and criminal liability for non-remittance.

obligations.title: PAYE Deduction
obligations.description: Deduct Pay As You Earn (PAYE) income tax from employee salaries and remit to KRA by the 9th of each month.
obligations.action: Calculate PAYE via KRA PAYE calculator. Remit on iTax.
obligations.penalty: 25% penalty on unpaid PAYE plus interest.

food_vendor.label: Food Vendor / Restaurant / Mkokoteni
food_vendor.description: Sells prepared food or beverages, including street food, kiosks, cafes, and restaurants

obligations.title: Single Business Permit
obligations.description: Required for all food businesses operating from any premises.
obligations.action: Apply at your county offices.
obligations.penalty: Business closure.

obligations.title: Food Hygiene / Health Certificate
obligations.description: You and any food handlers must obtain a valid Food Handler's Certificate from the county public health office.
obligations.action: Visit your nearest public health office. Renew annually. Keep premises clean for inspection.
obligations.penalty: Immediate closure, fines, and potential criminal charges.

obligations.title: PIN Registration with KRA
obligations.description: Register for a KRA PIN.
obligations.action: Register at itax.kra.go.ke
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 10,000.

obligations.title: Employee Registration (NSSF & NHIF)
obligations.description: Register and remit for any employees monthly.
obligations.action: Register at nssf.or.ke and nhif.or.ke.
obligations.penalty: Criminal liability for non-remittance.

agent_service.label: Mobile Money / M-Pesa Agent
agent_service.description: Licensed agent providing mobile money, airtime, or payment services

obligations.title: Agent Authorization Letter
obligations.description: You must hold a valid agent authorization from your principal (e.g., Safaricom for M-Pesa). Display it visibly.
obligations.action: Obtain and display authorization. Renew as required by principal.
obligations.penalty: Deregistration and criminal charges for operating without authorization.

obligations.title: Single Business Permit
obligations.description: Required for operating a physical agent outlet.
obligations.action: Apply at county offices.
obligations.penalty: Business closure.

obligations.title: PIN Registration with KRA
obligations.description: Register for a KRA PIN.
obligations.action: Register at itax.kra.go.ke
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 10,000.

obligations.title: Know Your Customer (KYC) Compliance
obligations.description: Verify customer identity for transactions above regulatory thresholds. Maintain transaction records.
obligations.authority: Central Bank of Kenya / Financial Reporting Centre
obligations.action: Always verify ID for large transactions. Keep records for at least 7 years.
obligations.penalty: Fines up to KES 1 million and agent deregistration.
